profileSummary: Andres Janes is a Senior Software Engineer at Cision with 10+ years of experience, specialising in Vue.js, TypeScript, and full-stack web development with Ruby on Rails. He currently builds enterprise media monitoring tools used by Fortune 500 companies. Previously led frontend development at Windsor Telecom, where he championed Vue.js adoption and shipped a webRTC softphone PWA that replaced costly desktop software. Originally from Colombia, now based in the UK, and a new dad to Arianna. He actively builds side projects including one-question (an AI tracker scoring the likelihood of AI replacing engineers) and feed-ai (AI-powered RSS digest platform). Known by colleagues for his calm, solution-oriented approach and genuine sense of humour.
